channel.title: Note-Taking on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Note-Taking on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Note-Taking Best Practices
item.description:
Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about note taking best practices.

I’ve gotten a lot of questions about my taking notes, which I’ve done for decades. In fact, in my video about a really bad College teacher I had, I speculated that’s when I started taking notes, because she was so critical of my notes for her class. Now I get questions all the time and I direct them to two videos. I have one C about my notes and one C about my notes part two, but for some people they want more, so I picked one of the questions. This is from MK gm8 yl who asks: I watched both of your note videos.

item.title: About My Notes, Part 2
item.description:
Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my notes again.

I’m always mentioning my notes. I’ve done a whole video about my notes, linked below. It’s called about my notes, um, but I see a lot of comments. I shouldn’t say a lot. I see a frequent number of comments where people think, because I tell stories and there are people in them doing not nice things, that I’m still angry or that I’m holding a lot of grudges or that I tend to blame people a lot. And I don’t know what to do about the last one, because I think I’ve said a lot of things where I blame me and the things I’ve done badly. All I can tell you is one: I don’t really feel like there’s any point in staying angry about things and holding grudges, and I really don’t do that and I’m not doing that, despite what it may seem.

item.title: About My Notes...
item.description:
Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my note-taking system I’ve had a lot of questions about.

You know, in the telling of these stories, sometimes I go into excruciating detail and it’s because I’ve always kept a lot of notes, and I’m going to talk about what that is. I’ll even show you a few, but it’s nothing amazing. It’s not like you’re going to leave here going. I have a whole new journaling system in my life. I’m just going to talk to you about what I did and why I can talk about a lot of things with a lot of tail. Even then I try to run some of my stories by people I’ve worked with to make sure: is this what happened? Because sometimes I read something in my journal when I don’t remember it, but I wrote it down right after it happened.
